events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario describes a "milkshake oil cap (FD)" on a manufacturing/assembly floor in the Automotive & Powertrain scope, fluids & leaks. A "milkshake" oil cap indicates coolant mixed with oil, forming a milky sludge under the oil cap. This is a serious defect indicating internal coolant leak / blown head gasket or cracked block/coolant intrusion into oil. At rough-complete stage, this is installed-defective and non-compliant. Decision should be fail due to dangerous/non-compliant condition. Risk high/critical. Need findings and actions.
